name: Diz Disley
abstract: William Charles "Diz" Disley (27 May 1931 – 22 March 2010) was an Anglo-Canadian jazz guitarist and banjoist. He is best known for his acoustic jazz guitar playing, strongly influenced by Django Reinhardt, for his contributions to the UK trad jazz, skiffle and folk scenes as a performer and humorist, and for his collaborations with the v…

concerts.label: Stéphane Grappelli and the Diz Disley Trio / Ronnie Scott and His Trio

works.t: No No Nanette: Tea for Two
I Can't Give You Anything But Love

about_quotes.speaker: Pug Horton
about_quotes.evidence: there was a guitar/banjo player called Diz Disley in England... And I remember he had sent for some records from the United States.
about_quotes.doc_title: Pug Horton interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, May 22, 1998
